tool_args.label: MTA Metro-North Railroad 2023 Year-End Report Summary

payload.title: MTA METRO-NORTH RAILROAD 2023 YEAR-END REPORT SUMMARY

tool_args.label: Cash Deficit Variance vs Final Estimate 2023

payload.raw_value_text: $129.7 million or 14.2% lower than the Final Estimate

tool_args.label: Other Operating Revenue Variance vs FE 2023

payload.raw_value_text: $15.9 million or 25.0% higher than the Final Estimate

tool_args.label: Cash Farebox Revenue Variance vs FE 2023

payload.raw_value_text: $17.4 million or 3.3% higher than the Final Estimate
Total annual East of Hudson ridership of 59.1 million
West of Hudson ridership was 1.0 million
416 lower than the Adopted Budget of 6,914 positions

payload.claim_text: Metro-North Railroad's (Metro-North) financial performance compared to the 2023 Final Estimate was favorable by $33.4 million. This favorable result was primarily due to higher operating revenues.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.claim_text: Metro-North's financial performance compared to the 2023 Adopted Budget was favorable by $27.0 million. This favorable result was due to higher operating revenues partially offset by higher non-reimbursable payroll and overtime labor costs.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.claim_text: Overspending of $11.0M vs Final Estimate through December is primarily due to higher programmatic maintenance, scheduled service needs, vacancy coverage and weather emergencies.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: Combined Overtime Unfavorable vs Final Estimate 2023

payload.claim_text: Combined Non-Reimbursable and Reimbursable Overtime is unfavorable vs Final Estimate by $9.8M
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment.
payload.description: Financial results and ridership figures are stated as preliminary and subject to audit review
CDOT provides capital and other reimbursements to Metro-North; CDOT reimbursable cash receipts timing variance of $23.4 million
MTA Headquarters provides Payroll and Accounts Payable Processing, IT, and MTA Police Department services in support of Metro-North's New Haven Line

tool_args.label: Metro-North Subsidy Payments to NJ Transit

payload.description: Higher subsidy payments to New Jersey Transit resulting from inflationary adjustments
